parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are the Analyzer — Stage 1 of a code review pipeline. Examine the provided source code. Return ONLY a JSON object with these fields: files_analyzed (array of filenames), language (string), loc_total (integer), functions (array of function names), classes (array of class names), imports (array of import names), complexity_notes (array of strings noting complex areas), summary (2-3 sentence overview).' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Analyze the code at: ' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.target_path + '\n\n' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.content } ], stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1, num_predict: 1024 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are the Reviewer — Stage 2 of a code review pipeline. Identify bugs, security issues, code smells, and style problems. Return ONLY a JSON object: { issues: [ { severity: (critical|high|medium|low), category: (bugs|security|code_smell|style), description, location, evidence } ], overall_risk: (critical|high|medium|low), files_reviewed: [], summary }.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Review code at: ' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.target_path + '

=== ANALYZER OUTPUT ===
' + $('Analyzer').first().json.message.content + '

=== SOURCE CODE ===
' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.content } ], stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1, num_predict: 1024 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are the Suggester — Stage 3 of a code review pipeline. Propose concrete improvements ranked by impact (priority 1 = highest). Include before/after code snippets. Return ONLY a JSON object: { improvements: [ { priority, title, rationale, addresses_issue, before, after } ], quick_wins: [], summary }.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Suggest improvements for: ' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.target_path + '

=== ANALYZER OUTPUT ===
' + $('Analyzer').first().json.message.content + '

=== REVIEWER OUTPUT ===
' + $('Reviewer').first().json.message.content + '

=== SOURCE CODE ===
' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.content } ], stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1, num_predict: 1024 } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama3.2:3b', messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You are the Summarizer — the final stage of a code review pipeline. Synthesize all previous outputs into an executive report. Score 0-100: start at 100, deduct 15 per critical/high issue, 5 per medium, 10 for high complexity. Return ONLY a JSON object: { executive_summary: (2-3 non-technical sentences), overall_score: (integer 0-100), critical_findings: [], top_improvements: [] }.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Synthesize report for: ' + $('Read Source Files').first().json.target_path + '

=== ANALYZER OUTPUT ===
' + $('Analyzer').first().json.message.content + '

=== REVIEWER OUTPUT ===
' + $('Reviewer').first().json.message.content + '

=== SUGGESTER OUTPUT ===
' + $('Suggester').first().json.message.content } ], stream: false, format: 'json', options: { temperature: 0.1, num_predict: 512 } }) }}
